name: Blue Bird Corp
summary: The Company (formerly Hennessy Capital Acquisition Corp.) was incorporated in Delaware on September 24, 2013 as a special purpose acquisition company, or SPAC. On February 24, 2015, the Company consummated a business combination (the Business Combination), pursuant to which the Company acquired all of the outstanding capital stock of School Bus Holdings Inc., a Delaware corporation (School Bus Holdings or SBH) from The Traxis Group, B.V. (the Seller). The total purchase price was paid in a combi...
